namespace Sample;

public partial class MySchema
{
    private class QueryGraphType : global::GraphQL.Types.Aot.AotAutoRegisteringObjectGraphType<global::Sample.Query>
    {
        private static QueryGraphType? _cache;
        private readonly global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<global::System.Reflection.MemberInfo, global::System.Action<global::GraphQL.Types.FieldType, global::System.Reflection.MemberInfo>> _members = null!;

        public QueryGraphType() : this(_cache)
        {
        }

        private QueryGraphType(QueryGraphType? cloneFrom) : base(cloneFrom)
        {
            if (cloneFrom != null)
            {
                return;
            }

            _members = new()
            {
                { typeof(global::Sample.Query).GetProperty(nameof(global::Sample.Query.Value))!, ConstructField0_Value },
            };
            foreach (var fieldType in ProvideFields())
            {
                AddField(fieldType);
            }

            if (global::GraphQL.GlobalSwitches.EnableReflectionCaching)
            {
                _cache = new QueryGraphType(this);
            }
        }

        protected override global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<global::System.Reflection.MemberInfo> GetRegisteredMembers() => _members.Keys;
        protected override void BuildFieldType(global::GraphQL.Types.FieldType fieldType, global::System.Reflection.MemberInfo memberInfo)
        {
            _members[memberInfo](fieldType, memberInfo);
        }

        public void ConstructField0_Value(global::GraphQL.Types.FieldType fieldType, global::System.Reflection.MemberInfo memberInfo)
        {
            fieldType.Resolver = BuildFieldResolver(context => GetMemberInstance(context).Value, false);
        }

    }
}

namespace Sample;

public partial class MySchema
{
    protected override void Configure()
    {
        AddAotType<global::GraphQL.Types.AutoRegisteringObjectGraphType<global::Sample.Query>, QueryGraphType>();
        AddAotType<global::GraphQL.Types.ByteGraphType>();

        RegisterType(typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.AutoRegisteringObjectGraphType<global::Sample.Query>));
        RegisterType(typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.ByteGraphType));

        RegisterTypeMapping(typeof(global::Sample.Query), typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.AutoRegisteringObjectGraphType<global::Sample.Query>));

        RemapType(typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.IdGraphType), typeof(global::GraphQL.Types.ByteGraphType));

        Query = GetRequiredService<global::GraphQL.Types.AutoRegisteringObjectGraphType<global::Sample.Query>>();

    }
